fr:frontmatter.fr:title: Internal parametricity for cubical type theory
fr:frontmatter.fr:meta: @inproceedings{cavallo-harper-2020, author = {Cavallo, Evan and Harper, Robert}, editor = {Fern\'{a}ndez, Maribel and Muscholl, Anca}, address = {Dagstuhl, Germany}, publisher = {Schloss Dagstuhl--Leibniz-Zentrum fuer Informatik}, url = {https://drops.dagstuhl.de/opus/volltexte/2020/11656}, annotation = {Keywords: parametricity, cubical type theory, higher inductive types}, booktitle = {28th EACSL Annual Conference on Computer Science Logic (CSL 2020)}, year = {2020}, doi = {10.4230/LIPIcs.CSL.2020.13}, isbn = {978-3-95977-132-0}, issn = {1868-8969}, pages = {13:1--13:17}, series = {Leibniz International Proceedings in Informatics (LIPIcs)}, title = {{Internal Parametricity for Cubical Type Theory}}, volume = {152}, }
